assertions.title: Canonical product-create accepts only a resolved active brandId

steps.expected: brandId is required on CatalogProductEntryRequest
Fail closed with validation error
Fail closed for unknown brand
steps.observed: HTTP 404 data={'traceId': 'ab0d09db-6059-4949-808e-1be6215cfa1d', 'reason': 'Brand not found for id 999999999', 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'BUS_003', 'message': 'Brand not found for id 999999999', 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 17096210]}

steps.expected: Fail closed for inactive brand
steps.observed: HTTP 409 data={'traceId': '01bc2180-4398-4396-a7af-4df1a99668b0', 'reason': "Brand 'ut_cat_product_inputs_brand_inactive_20260321T081346Z_f2f162' is inactive", 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'BUS_001', 'message': "Brand 'ut_cat_product_inputs_brand_inactive_20260321T081346Z_f2f162' is inactive", 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 30633127]}

steps.expected: Create succeeds

assertions.title: Canonical product-create rejects inline brand fallback fields

steps.action: Inspect OpenAPI request schema for legacy brand fallback fields
steps.expected: brandName, brandCode, and nested brand payload are absent

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/products with brandName, brandCode, and nested brand payload
steps.expected: Fail closed because inline fallback fields are unsupported
steps.observed: HTTP 400 data={'traceId': '91bfca8e-464e-41bd-af06-5769817a89ce', 'reason': 'Unsupported fields in canonical product request: brand, brandCode, brandName', 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'Unsupported fields in canonical product request: brand, brandCode, brandName', 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 103190583]}

assertions.title: Canonical product-create uses array inputs only

steps.action: Inspect OpenAPI request schema for sizes/colors types
steps.expected: Both fields are arrays
Create succeeds for canonical array inputs

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/products with packed token case slash-size
steps.expected: Fail closed instead of expanding packed tokens
steps.observed: HTTP 400 data={'traceId': '44cd0448-0c55-493a-9c25-0f259d53f4c4', 'reason': 'sizes entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'sizes entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 117591278]}

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/products with packed token case comma-color
steps.expected: Fail closed instead of expanding packed tokens
steps.observed: HTTP 400 data={'traceId': '2b65a095-90c4-4d8b-9f1a-d2bf3b1a7685', 'reason': 'colors entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'colors entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 130528640]}

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/products with packed token case semicolon-size
steps.expected: Fail closed instead of expanding packed tokens
steps.observed: HTTP 400 data={'traceId': 'feaf1246-16fb-4536-9b98-abd7eb50a1fb', 'reason': 'sizes entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'sizes entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 144482777]}

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/products with packed token case newline-color
steps.expected: Fail closed instead of expanding packed tokens
steps.observed: HTTP 400 data={'traceId': '375c1df5-30b3-47b1-bf76-3ac24229167d', 'reason': 'colors entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'path': '/api/v1/catalog/products', 'code': 'VAL_001', 'message': 'colors entries must be single canonical values; packed multi-value tokens are not supported', 'timestamp': [2026, 3, 21, 8, 13, 47, 158614603]}

assertions.title: Canonical request and response preserve base-product fields

steps.expected: Required base-product fields remain in canonical request and response/readback contracts

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/products with all base-product fields populated
steps.expected: Response echoes persisted base-product fields
List readback preserves the same persisted fields
Detail readback preserves the same persisted fields

assertions.title: Variant-group linkage is explicit, persisted, and returned

steps.expected: Response returns explicit shared family/group identity for all members
Follow-up canonical list returns all created members with the same persisted variantGroupId/family name

frictions.description: MOCK runtime has no finished-good default accounts configured, so finished-good commit probes fail with VAL_007 in this reset. I validated the assigned product-input contract assertions using canonical RAW_MATERIAL creates that do not mutate shared company defaults.
frictions.resolution: Used existing inventory account id 5 in raw-material metadata while keeping all tested writes on canonical /api/v1/catalog/** routes.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped. Validation used canonical catalog routes plus read-only prerequisite discovery for an existing inventory account and created namespaced brands/products under ut_cat_product_inputs.
